message:
fix(obligation): prevent AuthNat fragment overflow in separation logic RA composition

AuthNat::Frag(a).compose(&Frag(b)) used unchecked a + b which would
panic in debug mode or wrap in release mode for extreme u64 values.
Changed to checked_add returning None (invalid composition) on overflow,
which is semantically correct: more fragments than u64::MAX is an
invalid resource algebra state.

Added regression test auth_nat_fragment_overflow_returns_none.

bd-2wds9

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
